title: KandyToys Scratch It! Rainbow Scratch Art Kids Art Kit With Stencils
features: Unleash your child's creativity with our Rainbow Scratch Art stencil craft set
It's simple and fun, just scrape the black top layer away to reveal the bright colours underneath and make rainbow pictures!
You can use the stencils included, or go freestyle and draw whatever you like with endless possibilities!
Includes: 2 rainbow scratch sheets, 2 stencils, 1 wooden scratching tool
Not recommended for children under the age of 3
description: Product Description Explore Arts and Crafts From colouring to painting and plaster casting, we have a wide range of arts and crafts sets and kits that are great fun for any budding crafter to try and plenty of mini pocket money packs perfect for a crafty play session! Encourage Creativity Let little ones stretch their imaginations through arts, crafts and creative play. Make magical unicorns, wacky monsters, cuddly woodland animal friends and more! Gets Hands On Knitting, sticking, squishing and moulding! Get stuck in with tactile play away from screens to learn, develop and practice some new skills! Give french knitting a try, or work on your fine motor skills with one of our dough sets.
